title: stachys huber-morathii
intro: Stachys huber-morathii, also known as Himalayan woundwort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Stachys huber-morathii include wound healing, reduction of fever, and relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. It can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, with some herbal preparations also using the plant's roots and leaves in the form of salves or creams for topical application.
